dispositions.note: On closer reading of the frozen SCHEMA.md, status and normativity are distinct fields in the six-dimension record ('status' and 'normativity' are listed separately), and the taxonomy section is titled 'Status / normativity taxonomy', a single closed vocabulary drawn from by two orthogonal fields. Discipline 2 constrains the NORMATIVE label on claims (requiring an oracle); it does not forbid status: NORMATIVE-CURRENT on a record whose normativity is ADVISORY — the currency axis (current vs superseded) is what NORMATIVE-CURRENT vs SUPERSEDED tracks. The pre-review's pairing is therefore coherent under the frozen text, and the candidate's §2 mirrors it faithfully ('status: NORMATIVE-CURRENT with normativity: ADVISORY, matching the approved pre-review'). No genuine defect in the frozen material; withdrawing my escalation as resolved by re-reading, not by any change.
